title: XSS: Unescaped output of directory name - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd
how_to_find: XSS: Unescaped output of directory name - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd

summary.vuln_point: XSS due to unescaped output: a user-controlled value is rendered without HTML/JS context-aware escaping.
summary.impact: Arbitrary JavaScript execution in victim browsers; can lead to account takeover actions depending on context.
